response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to agentic workflows at Stripe, but lacks demonstrable production-scale leadership in AI-native fintech, multi-agent system architecture, or regulated financial systems — key requirements for a CTO role. His open-source contributions and technical depth are impressive, but his leadership experience is underdeveloped and fintech domain knowledge is absent.
strengths: Exposure to agentic AI infrastructure at Stripe via MCP frameworks
Strong backend and distributed systems experience across high-throughput environments
Proven ability to ship complex systems and contribute to open-source tooling
concerns: No evidence of leading engineering teams beyond 10 people or developing senior technical leadership layers
Lacks demonstrated experience in regulated fintech domains (credit risk, compliance, working capital)
No clear track record in architecting stateful, event-driven multi-agent systems with feedback loops
